The '''''Kaloth''-style battlecruiser''' was a warship manufactured by [[Kaloth]].

==Characteristics==
The class's firepower could be compared to an [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]]. It was only [[Ray shield/Legends|ray shielded]], leaving it vulnerable to physical projectiles (like [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedoes]]) and space debris. Unlike most cruisers utilized by pirates, the base model did not include [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion weapons]], although it did include a [[Tractor beam/Legends|tractor beam]].

==History==
The ''Kaloth''-style battlecruiser was designed and introduced at least as of [[44 BBY/Legends|44 BBY]]. That year, they were used by the [[Stark Commercial Combine]] during the [[Stark Hyperspace War/Legends|Stark Hyperspace War]].<ref name="EGW" />

By the time of the [[Caamas Document Crisis]], only few such vessels remained, all of them in hands of [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] groups such as the [[Cavrilhu Pirates]] or [[Thalassian slavers/Legends|Thalassian slavers]].

One such vessel was used by the Cavrilhu Pirates in a [[Raid at Iphigin|raid]] against [[Iphigin]]. The same vessel was later used to [[Battle of Pesitiin|attack]] the [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] [[Chimaera/Legends|''Chimaera'']] at [[Pesitiin]], where it was destroyed by a volley of 15 proton torpedoes fired by the ''Chimaera''.

Another ''Kaloth''-style battlecruiser was the ''[[Harmzuay]]'', one of the most infamous ships in the Thalassian fleet.<ref name="GG9" />
